title: bus.tengine.approval.requested v1
description: When: The orchestrator needs a human operator to approve a high-stakes action (e.g. a wave gate, a destructive bead, a promote decision). Source: /tengine. Emitted via the bus-emit CLI or Rust helper; consumers display pending approvals in dashboards or block pipeline progression until resolved.

host.description: Hostname of the machine that generated this event.

kind.description: Approval category or action type being requested, e.g. 'wave_gate', 'bead_force_push', 'promote'.

summary.description: Human-readable description of what is being approved and why it requires manual intervention.

diff_preview_url.description: Optional URL to a diff or comparison view that shows what would change if approved.

expires_at.description: Optional RFC3339 timestamp after which this approval request becomes stale and should be rejected.

reply_to.description: Optional return address or channel for the approver to send their decision (e.g. an email address or bus channel).
